creation_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the instance group manager was created, useful for auditing changes

fingerprint.description: Unique fingerprint for detecting updates to the instance group manager's state

instance_group.description: Name of the associated instance group for managing VM instances

instance_group_manager_id.description: Numeric identifier for the instance group manager resource

operation.description: Current operation status of the instance group manager, useful for tracking tasks

self_link.description: API URL for accessing the instance group manager resource directly

status.description: Details on the status and configuration of the instance group manager's versions
